question: Which of the following best describes the change in CO2 emissions in Country N from 2012 to 2021?

options.A: They generally decreased, despite some year-to-year fluctuations.
options.B: They generally increased, despite some year-to-year fluctuations.
options.C: They remained constant over the period.
options.D: They first decreased steadily and then remained constant.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes the series appear increasing when it is actually decreasing.
